<<<<<<< HEAD We Build Digital ======= We Build Digital >>>>>>> 5867a93 (done) Welcome to cmcintosh.net! I’m Christopher McIntosh, a seasoned Full Stack Developer with over 15 years of experience navigating the ever-evolving world of technology. My journey has equipped me with a profound understanding of digital solutions, ranging from web applications to computer and network repair. <<<<<<< HEAD ======= >>>>>>> 5867a93 (done) If you’re a coder, explore my current projects for inspiration. Potential employers can view the web version of my resume, showcasing my professional journey. And if you’re in need of a custom web application, expert consulting, or reliable computer and network repair services, request a quote tailored to your needs. Let’s build something extraordinary together! <<<<<<< HEAD =======

Mobile and Desktop App Development

Stay ahead in the digital era with our mobile and desktop app development services. We create powerful, user-friendly applications that run smoothly across all devices, ensuring your audience has the best experience whether they’re on the go or at their desk. Our expertise spans both iOS and Android platforms, as well as Windows and macOS, providing you with versatile and robust solutions.

Graphic Design and Branding

Make a lasting impression with our professional graphic design and branding services. As an Adobe Certified expert, I craft visually stunning and cohesive designs that resonate with your target audience. From logos and marketing materials to complete brand identities, we ensure your brand stands out and communicates your vision effectively.

Computer Repair and Consulting

Keep your systems running smoothly with our computer repair and consulting services. With A+ and Network+ certifications, we offer reliable solutions for all your hardware and software issues. Our consulting services provide expert advice and strategies to optimize your IT infrastructure, ensuring maximum efficiency and minimal downtime for your business.
